content: Resend setup for Next.js: 1) npm install resend. 2) RESEND_API_KEY env var (server-only, no NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix). 3) API route pattern: import { Resend } from 'resend'; const resend = new Resend(process.env.RESEND_API_KEY); const { data, error } = await resend.emails.send({ from: 'GSD Cloud <noreply@yourdomain.com>', to: [email], subject: '...', react: EmailTemplate({...}) }). 4) React Email: import from 'react-email' (not deprecated @react-email/components). The react-email package is the CLI dev tool; for rendering use @react-email/render v2.0.9. Email templates are React components returning JSX. 5) Better Auth integration: use sendVerificationEmail and sendResetPassword callbacks in auth config. Resend free tier: 100 emails/day, 3000/month. Must verify sender domain in Resend dashboard (use resend.dev domain for testing).
